title: rubus × contectus
intro: Rubus × contectus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry genera, is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Rubus × contectus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus × contectus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and it is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its sweet and flavorful fruit.
